Home About Books Publications Contact Me!

My Publications

SCOPUS Indexed

  • The Impact of Technology in the Health Insurance Sector – a book chapter which explores how technology is shaping the health insurance industry of India, published with River Publications (2024)
  • Adoption of Sustainable Digital Technologies in Industry 4.0 – a book chapter exploring how technology is shaping the new industrial revolution, published with Taylor & Francis (2023)
  • Patents and Innovations for Digital Sustainability – a book chapter exploring the various technological and research innovations contributing towards sustainability education in India, published with Taylor & Francis (2023)
  • A Study Regarding the Effectiveness of Environmental Education on Climate Change – a book chapter highlighting importance of evironmental education in India, published with Wiley (2023)
  • A Comparative Study of ResNet50, EfficientNetB7, InceptionV3, VGG16 models in Crop and Weed classification – a paper highlighitng the importance and implementation of AI in Agriculture 4.0 , published in IEEE (2023)
  • CNN based IDS Framework for Financial Cyber Security – a paper outlining the improtance of Financial Cyber Security by implementation of an IDS, published in IEEE (2023)
  • Neural network based approach for Ethereum fraud detection – a paper aimed at the implementation of Neural networks to prevent frauds in the crypto world, published in IEEE (2023)
  • Predicting the occurrence of Ischemic stroke by Gradient Boost Approaches – an implementation based paper which aims to help in the medical diagnosis of Ischemic strokes, published in IEEE (2023)
  • Framework for Evaluating Ethics in AI – a paper presenting an insight into the ethics relating to the implementation of AI in this new era, published in IEEE (2023)

Other Publications

  • Factors affecting health insurance adoption and awareness in Uttar Pradesh, India: A comprehensive analysis – a journal paper focusing on the adoption of health insurance and its awareness in the state of Uttar Pradesh published at JCGIRM (2023)
  • The Current Era of Ecommerce and Its Contribution to the Digital Economy – a research focusing on the impact that ecommerce leaves on the economy published at IRJEMS (2023)
  • The Effect of Changing population and inflation on the Indian GDP – a research paper relating the two booming concepts with the Indian GDP, published at IJTSRD (2022)
  • Class vs Caste: An analytical study of society – a dissertation analyzing the class and caste concepts in relation to the Indian Economy. Google Drive (2022)
